query.purpose: monotonic witness subset; the complete production query can only retain or increase the observed supported-consumer count

known_state_store.provenance: completed tracked-plan pilot dedicated root retained by the reviewed pilot contract

decision.reason: The generic scanner finds 24 supported old-identity consumer matches in a known retained state store. A complete retired-identity query cannot remove matches already found by this witness subset.
decision.disposition: retain design-plan-impl-implementation-phase as a workflow and reclassify its active internal-call record from procedure-candidate to effect-adapter

claims_not_made: This read-only witness scan is not a full retirement record or an owner attestation.
It does not authorize deletion, mutation, or reinterpretation of the completed pilot runs.
It does not claim that terminal matching runs are nonterminal; eligibility fails on supported consumer_count, not terminal_run_count.
It does not weaken the strict identity default, authorize a remap, or claim cross-source resume compatibility.
